ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( NOT($User.Bypass_Validation_Rules__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.Global_Complaint_Excluded_Subsidairy, RecordType.DeveloperName)), OR( ISPICKVAL(Type,"Complaint"), ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Type__c,"Complaint") ), OR( AND( INCLUDES(Financial_impact__c, 'Financial'), ISBLANK(Financial_Impact_type__c) ), AND( NOT(INCLUDES(Financial_impact__c,'Financial')), NOT(ISBLANK(Financial_Impact_type__c)) ) )
)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: If Impact Type 'Financial' is selected, please fill in the Financial Impact type. Otherwise leave it blank.
